frame.background: radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(236, 72, 153, 0.22), transparent 25%), radial-gradient(circle at left center, rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.18), transparent 35%), linear-gradient(180deg, #090b12 0%, #111827 45%, #020617 100%)

stage.backgroundImage: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.05), rgba(255,255,255,0)), radial-gradient(circle at 50% 100%, rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.14), transparent 32%)

preQuestion.speaker: Aurora
preQuestion.text: Welcome to Round 1. The arena is set and the questions will drop soon.

preQuestion.speaker: Echo
preQuestion.label: Incoming mission briefing
preQuestion.text: This round rewards speed and precision. Keep your answers sharp.
preQuestion.transcript: You have one shot per question. Answer fast to stay ahead.

duringQuestion.speaker: Aurora
duringQuestion.text: This is a turning point question. Good timing matters more now.

afterAnswer.speaker: Aurora
afterAnswer.label: Second question complete
afterAnswer.text: Nice work. The second question is locked in.
afterAnswer.transcript: Question two answer recorded. Keep the streak going.

finished.speaker: Aurora
finished.label: Round complete
finished.text: This run is finished. Check the leaderboard or wait for the next round.
finished.transcript: Your score was recorded. Prepare for the next round.
